market.question: Will NYC record at least 1 inch of rain by September 30, 2026?
market.description: Resolves Yes if the National Weather Service reports cumulative rainfall at Central Park of at least 1 inch for September 2026 by 11:59 PM ET on September 30, 2026.
market.resolutionRules: This market resolves Yes if the official National Weather Service Central Park station reports cumulative rainfall greater than or equal to 1 inch for September 2026 by 11:59 PM ET on September 30, 2026. The National Weather Service daily climate report is the final settlement source. If the report is corrected before settlement, the corrected official value is used.
